## Summary

What this changes and why.

## Area

source (hn / youtube / x / rss) · render · cli · mcp · digest · docs

## Verification

- [ ] `bun run typecheck` is clean
- [ ] `bun test` passes
- [ ] Ran the affected command / MCP tool live (paste a snippet)
- [ ] New source/logic has fixture-based tests (no network)

## Notes

Trade-offs, follow-ups, or anything reviewers should know.
